Privacy.title: Privacy Policy — Miney
Privacy.intro: Miney respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you use our profile-sharing web application.

section1.title: 1. Information We Collect
section1.desc: When you use Miney, we collect the following information:
section1.optional:
Profile photo
Bio
Birth Year
Relationship status
MBTI
Hobbies
Favorite songs, artists, books, foods, movies
Comfort zones
section1.media: Media: Users may optionally upload images. No videos or documents are required.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Your Data
section2.use:
To create your public profile so you can share it with others.
To personalize your app experience.
section2.no:
We do not:
Collect analytics (e.g., Google Analytics, Sentry)
Track errors or log user activity

section3.title: 3. Data Storage
section3.desc:
Your profile information is stored in Supabase Postgres.
Images are stored in Supabase Storage.

section4.title: 4. Authentication
section4.desc: We use Supabase Auth with Email/Password and Google OAuth.

section5.title: 5. Data Sharing
section5.desc: We never share your personal data with third parties, except necessary infrastructure providers like Supabase or Vercel.

section6.title: 6. User Control
section6.desc: You can delete your account and all associated profile data through your dashboard. You cannot recover your data once deleted.

section7.title: 7. Security
section7.desc: We implement standard security practices to protect your data, but please note that no system is completely secure.

Terms.title: Terms & Conditions – Miney
Terms.intro: By using Miney, you agree to the following terms:

section1.title: 1. About Miney
section1.desc: Miney is a profile-sharing web app developed and maintained solely by Aung Chan Pyae (Bubble).
section1.warning: This profile-building web application, Miney, is maintained by only one person. Therefore, it is not easy to monitor or provide support in real-time. For this reason, please be aware that you should not input any important personal information (sensitive data). Also, please be careful not to upload photos or text that may cause annoyance or distress to others.

section2.title: 2. User Responsibility
section2.items:
• Users must provide accurate information for public profiles.
• Do not upload harmful or illegal content.

section3.title: 3. Account Management
section3.desc: Users can create, edit, or delete their profiles at any time.

section4.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
section4.items:
• Miney is not a commerical product.
• The developer is not responsible for any damages arising from the use of the app.

section5.title: 5. Modifications
section5.desc: Terms may change over time. Continued use constitutes acceptance.

section1.title: 1. What Are Cookies?
section1.desc: Cookies are small files stored on your device to help the app remember your preferences and authentication session.

section2.title: 2. How We Use Cookies
section2.list:
Authentication: Keep you logged in securely.
Language Preference: Store your chosen locale/language.

section3.title: 3. Managing Cookies
section3.desc: You can clear or block cookies in your browser, but some app functionality may not work properly.
